title: Streambox
summary: A production-built video platform proving Octane native media events, persistent player DOM state, and virtualized comments.

journeys.title: Play, pause, seek, change volume, and finish through native media events
Preserve the live video node through same-video routes and isolate engagement across videos
Window 180 comments, sort them, and recover from an empty search
Open a transcript deep link on mobile and control playback by keyboard
Retry a catalog failure and queue rapid actions while local playback stays offline

faultScenarios.description: The scenario query fails the first deterministic catalog load and succeeds on explicit retry.
The browser disconnects after media is ready; playback remains usable and product actions queue until reconnect.
